82–98 =Unassigned. N/A 

99 = Other Place of Service. Other place of service not identified above. 

Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: Values containing digits will include leading zeros. https://www.cms.gov/Medicare/Coding/place-of-
